title: Implement full dataflow analysis with branch merging
description: Replace dataflow stub with complete DataflowAnalyzer: Define (strong update for ;), DefineIndeterminate for command substitution, MergeBranch for &&/|| may-alias union, Resolve, ResolveString with cartesian product (capped at 16), ExportedVars. Update extractor walk for branch analyzers in list nodes, emit WarnExpansionCapped/WarnCommandSubstitution, produce multiple ExtractedCommand variants. Unit tests for all dataflow scenarios.

comments.author: Danny Cosson
comments.text: Completed otc.3 dataflow branch semantics and verification. DataflowAnalyzer now supports multi-value merges for &&/||, DefineIndeterminate, ResolveString cartesian expansion with cap=16, and ExportedVars. Extractor emits WarnCommandSubstitution/WarnExpansionCapped and produces multiple command variants. Added coverage for || may-alias and expansion-cap behavior. Latest commit: c630194.

comments.author: Danny Cosson
comments.text: Reviewer approved commit c630194 for otc.3. Closing bead as complete.
